resources.string: Lets Maya see foreground apps + tab content + click for you (per your privacy toggles)

Maya needs Accessibility permission to (1) read which app/tab you\'re on, (2) optionally click for you when you ask, (3) capture screen snippets when Mo enables eyes. Default OFF for hands · ON for eyes. Toggle either OFF from Maya OS Campus banner any time. Nothing leaves the device without going to your own iamsuperio.cloud server.
Persistent notification while the Maya local bridge is serving the PWA on 127.0.0.1:8765
Bridge serving on 127.0.0.1:8765 · tap to manage
